annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone overlay visibility, highlighting, shader preview, and Snap Assist.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Show the zone overlay on all screens.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Hide the zone overlay.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns true if the overlay is currently visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if overlay is visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Highlight a single zone by UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID to highlight.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Highlight multiple zones at once.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of zone UUIDs to highlight.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear all zone highlights.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the overlay poll interval in milliseconds.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Poll interval in milliseconds.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the minimum zone size in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Minimum zone size in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the minimum zone display size in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Minimum zone display size in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Show shader preview overlay at given screen coordinates (called from editor Shader Settings dialog).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Global X coordinate for preview top-left.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Global Y coordinate for preview top-left.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview width in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview height in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen ID (empty = screen containing x,y).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Shader UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON map of uniform names to values (from translateParamsToUniforms).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of zone objects (x,y,width,height in preview pixel coords).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Update existing shader preview geometry and/or params.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview X position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview Y position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview width.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview height.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Updated shader parameters JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Updated zones JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Hide and destroy the shader preview overlay.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Show Snap Assist overlay with candidate windows. Called by KWin effect after dragStopped when snapAssistRequested is true.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen ID where the snap occurred.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of EmptyZoneEntry structs: (zoneId, x, y, width, height, borderWidth, borderRadius, useCustomColors, highlightColor, inactiveColor, borderColor, activeOpacity, inactiveOpacity).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of SnapAssistCandidate structs: (windowId, compositorHandle, icon, caption).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if overlay was shown.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Hide the Snap Assist overlay.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns true if Snap Assist overlay is visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if Snap Assist is visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Deliver a window thumbnail to the daemon as raw ARGB32 pixels. Called by the kwin-effect; authenticated against /proc/<pid>/exe. Returns true iff the payload was accepted into the daemon's bounded LRU cache. See OverlayAdaptor::setSnapAssistThumbnail in src/dbus/overlayadaptor.cpp for the full validation and trust contract.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: KWin internal UUID (EffectWindow::internalId().toString(), braced form).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Image width in pixels. Bounded; oversized values are rejected.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Image height in pixels. Bounded; oversized values are rejected.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Tightly-packed ARGB32 (non-premultiplied) bytes, exactly width*height*4 long.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True iff the daemon stored the thumbnail in its LRU cache. False on auth failure, oversize-payload rejection, dimension/byte-count mismatch, or post-shutdown engine teardown. Callers use this to decide whether to mark the handle as recently-posted; a false reply must NOT be treated as success.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Deliver a window thumbnail as a single-plane DMA-BUF (zero-copy GPU path) instead of raw pixels. Experimental: the daemon only accepts it when started with PLASMAZONES_DMABUF_THUMBNAILS set, otherwise returns false and the caller must fall back to setSnapAssistThumbnail. Authenticated against /proc/<pid>/exe like the raw-pixel method. The fd is consumed/duplicated by the daemon's GPU import; the caller may close its copy after the call returns.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: KWin internal UUID (EffectWindow::internalId().toString(), braced form).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Image width in pixels. Bounded; oversized values are rejected.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Image height in pixels. Bounded; oversized values are rejected.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: DRM FourCC pixel format of the buffer (e.g. DRM_FORMAT_ABGR8888).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: DRM format modifier (DRM_FORMAT_MOD_* or vendor-specific) describing the buffer's tiling/layout.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Plane 0 row stride in bytes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Plane 0 byte offset within the buffer.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: DMA-BUF file descriptor for plane 0. Borrowed for the call; the daemon dup()s it if the import needs the buffer afterward.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: sync_file fence fd that signals when the producer's GPU render into the buffer completes. The daemon waits on it before sampling so a repeated/live producer is not read mid-render. Borrowed for the call.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True iff the daemon imported and stored the thumbnail. False when the dma-buf path is disabled (PLASMAZONES_DMABUF_THUMBNAILS unset), the driver/RHI backend can't import it, auth fails, or dimensions are out of range. On false the caller MUST fall back to setSnapAssistThumbnail.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when overlay show/hide state changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if overlay is visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the highlighted zone changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Currently highlighted zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Informational signal: emitted after the daemon has built the Snap Assist overlay. The kwin-effect drives thumbnail capture independently as part of the showSnapAssist call sequence (not in response to this signal); the signal is exposed for external observers (KCMs, debugging tools).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen ID where snap occurred.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of EmptyZoneEntry structs: (zoneId, x, y, width, height, borderWidth, borderRadius, useCustomColors, highlightColor, inactiveColor, borderColor, activeOpacity, inactiveOpacity).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of SnapAssistCandidate structs: (windowId, compositorHandle, icon, caption).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Informational signal: emitted when the Snap Assist overlay closes — whether through a user pick, an Escape / backdrop dismiss, an external hideSnapAssist() D-Bus call, or a screen-change cancel. Pairs with snapAssistShown so external observers (KCMs, kwin-effect, debugging tools) can mirror the visible/hidden state without polling isSnapAssistVisible. Carries no payload; the dismiss reason is intentionally not surfaced because the daemon collapses every dismiss path through the same internal IOverlayService::snapAssistDismissed signal.
